meaning: [复]n.[总称](具有历史意义的)军用物品(如枪支、 勋章、制服等)
examples: Wittmann, Gottlieb, Casino and Ross are all regulars at the annual Militaria Antiques Xtravaganza (MAX) in Monroeville, Pa.
Mr Griffiths was known to have a keen interest in militaria and attended a number of fairs at Bisley, police said.
Officers have released photographs of six items of militaria taken in a raid on a house in Catesby, near Daventry on 8 January between 10:00 and 16:00 GMT.
